name: Catalogizer Full QA - API
description: Comprehensive end-to-end API test bank for the Catalogizer Go/Gin backend covering all /api/v1 endpoints: authentication, health, storage roots, scanning, media browsing, media entities, collections, playlists, favorites, streaming, WebSocket, admin operations, and edge cases

test_cases.name: Login with valid admin credentials

steps.name: Send login request
steps.expected: 200 OK with JSON containing token field

steps.name: Verify token is a valid JWT
steps.action: Decode the returned token and inspect header and payload
steps.expected: Token has three base64 segments, alg HS256, contains username and role claims

test_cases.expected_result: Admin login succeeds and returns a valid JWT token

test_cases.name: Login with wrong password

steps.name: Send login request with wrong password

test_cases.expected_result: Login rejected with 401 when password is incorrect

test_cases.name: Login with empty credentials

steps.name: Send login with empty username and password

test_cases.expected_result: Login rejected when credentials are empty

test_cases.name: Login with SQL injection attempt
test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection in login has no effect, server remains healthy

test_cases.name: Token refresh with valid refresh token

steps.name: Login to obtain tokens
steps.expected: 200 OK with access token and refresh token

steps.name: Refresh the token
steps.action: POST /api/v1/auth/refresh with the refresh token from login
steps.expected: 200 OK with a new access token

steps.name: Use new token on protected endpoint

test_cases.expected_result: Token refresh returns a new valid access token

test_cases.name: Logout invalidates token

steps.name: Logout
steps.action: POST /api/v1/auth/logout with the obtained token in Authorization header

test_cases.expected_result: After logout the token is no longer accepted

test_cases.name: Access protected endpoint without token

steps.name: Call protected endpoint with no Authorization header

test_cases.expected_result: Protected endpoints reject requests without a token

test_cases.name: Access protected endpoint with expired token

steps.name: Craft a JWT with exp claim in the past
steps.action: Sign JWT with the server secret but exp = now - 3600

test_cases.expected_result: Expired tokens are rejected with a clear error

test_cases.name: Access admin endpoint as regular user

steps.name: Register or login as regular user

test_cases.expected_result: Regular users cannot access admin endpoints

test_cases.name: Register new user

steps.name: Send registration request
steps.expected: 201 Created or 200 OK with user info

test_cases.expected_result: New user registered and can log in

test_cases.name: Change password via auth endpoint
test_cases.expected_result: Password changed successfully and new password works

test_cases.name: Rate limiting on login endpoint

steps.name: Send 6 rapid failed login attempts
steps.action: POST /api/v1/auth/login with wrong password 6 times in under 10 seconds
steps.expected: After threshold, response becomes 429 Too Many Requests

test_cases.expected_result: Login rate limiting triggers after 5 rapid failed attempts

test_cases.name: Get current user info
test_cases.expected_result: Current user info returned with correct username and role

test_cases.name: Get auth status (public)
test_cases.expected_result: Auth status endpoint is accessible and returns status

steps.name: Get permissions
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of permissions for admin role

test_cases.name: Login with extra unknown fields
test_cases.expected_result: Extra fields in login body are safely ignored

test_cases.name: Get init status

steps.name: Request init status
steps.expected: 200 OK with initialization status (whether setup wizard is needed)

test_cases.expected_result: Init status endpoint returns setup state

test_cases.name: Token with invalid signature rejected

steps.name: Craft JWT signed with wrong secret
steps.action: Create JWT with payload {"username":"admin","role":"admin"} signed with secret 'wrong_secret'

test_cases.expected_result: Tokens signed with wrong secret are rejected

test_cases.name: Health endpoint returns version info

steps.name: Request health check
steps.expected: 200 OK with JSON containing status 'healthy', version, build_number, build_date, and time fields

test_cases.expected_result: Health endpoint returns healthy status with version metadata

test_cases.name: Deep health check includes component status

steps.name: Request deep health check
steps.expected: 200 OK with status and components object including database health

test_cases.expected_result: Deep health check reports database and component health

test_cases.name: Metrics endpoint returns Prometheus format

steps.name: Request metrics
steps.expected: 200 OK with text/plain Prometheus-format output containing go_goroutines, process_cpu_seconds_total

test_cases.expected_result: Prometheus metrics exposed in standard text format

test_cases.name: CORS headers present on API responses
test_cases.expected_result: CORS preflight returns correct allowed origin and methods

test_cases.name: Brotli compression in API responses

steps.name: Request with Accept-Encoding: br
steps.action: GET /api/v1/entities with Accept-Encoding: br and valid auth token

steps.name: Request with Accept-Encoding: gzip
steps.action: GET /api/v1/entities with Accept-Encoding: gzip and valid auth token

test_cases.expected_result: Brotli compression applied when requested, gzip as fallback

test_cases.name: Security headers present on all responses
test_cases.expected_result: Security headers set on all responses

test_cases.name: Request ID assigned to every response

steps.name: Send any request
steps.expected: Response contains X-Request-ID header with a unique identifier

test_cases.expected_result: Every response has a unique X-Request-ID header

test_cases.name: Image proxy endpoint for external images

steps.name: Proxy a TMDB image
steps.expected: 200 OK with proxied image content or appropriate error if URL invalid

test_cases.expected_result: Image proxy serves external images from allowed domains

test_cases.name: Concurrency limiter rejects excess requests

steps.name: Verify server responds under normal load

test_cases.expected_result: Server handles concurrent requests within configured limit

test_cases.name: Create collection

steps.expected: 200 OK with JSON array of collections

steps.name: Get collection details
steps.expected: 200 OK with collection name, description, and items

test_cases.name: Delete collection

steps.name: Create without token
steps.action: POST /api/v1/collections with body {"name":"Unauthorized"} and no auth

test_cases.name: Create collection with very long name

steps.name: Create with 500-character name
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with length validation or 201 Created (if no limit)

test_cases.expected_result: Very long collection name handled gracefully

test_cases.name: Collection with SQL injection in name

steps.name: Create with SQL injection
steps.action: POST /api/v1/collections with body {"name":"'; DROP TABLE media_collections; --"}
steps.expected: 201 Created with literal SQL string as name (no SQL execution)

test_cases.expected_result: SQL injection in collection name stored as literal text

steps.name: Send with text/plain
steps.action: PUT /api/v1/collections/{id} with Content-Type: text/plain and JSON body
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or 415 Unsupported Media Type

steps.expected: Receive JSON messages with scan progress updates

test_cases.expected_result: Scan progress events received via WebSocket in real-time

test_cases.name: Receive real-time update events via WebSocket

steps.name: Trigger an action that generates events
steps.action: Create or update an entity via HTTP

steps.name: Check for event
steps.expected: Event message received about the entity change

test_cases.expected_result: Real-time update events pushed via WebSocket

steps.name: Connect and wait
steps.action: Establish WebSocket connection and hold it open for 30 seconds
steps.expected: Connection stays alive with ping/pong frames

test_cases.name: WebSocket connection count tracked

steps.name: Check metrics
steps.action: GET /metrics and look for WebSocket connection count

test_cases.expected_result: WebSocket connection count accurately tracked in metrics

test_cases.name: WebSocket graceful close

steps.name: Send close frame
steps.action: Send WebSocket close frame from client
steps.expected: Server acknowledges close, connection terminated cleanly

test_cases.expected_result: WebSocket closes gracefully with proper close handshake

steps.name: Send oversized message
steps.expected: Connection closed with message too large error

test_cases.name: Multiple WebSocket clients receive same events

steps.name: Connect client A and client B
Verify both receive
steps.expected: Both client A and B receive the scan event

test_cases.expected_result: Events broadcast to all connected WebSocket clients

steps.name: Reconnect
steps.action: Establish new WebSocket connection with same auth

test_cases.name: Admin get system info

steps.name: Get system info
steps.expected: 200 OK with version, build number, build date, Go version, OS info

test_cases.expected_result: System info returned with build metadata

test_cases.name: Admin list users

steps.name: List users
steps.expected: 200 OK with array of user objects (no password fields)

test_cases.expected_result: User list returned without password fields

test_cases.name: Create user via users endpoint
test_cases.expected_result: New user created via users endpoint

test_cases.name: Lock and unlock user account

steps.name: Verify locked user cannot login
steps.expected: 403 Forbidden or 401 Unauthorized with account locked message

test_cases.expected_result: User account locked and unlocked successfully

steps.name: List backups
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of available backups

steps.name: Create backup
steps.expected: 200 OK or 201 Created with backup file info

steps.name: Get permissions
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of all permissions

steps.name: Create log collection
steps.expected: 200 OK or 201 Created with log collection ID

steps.name: List log collections
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of log collections

steps.name: Get log statistics
steps.expected: 200 OK with log statistics (counts by level, time distribution)

steps.name: Send request with very long URL
steps.action: GET /api/v1/entities?search=AAAA...x2000 (URL over 8000 chars) with auth token
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or 414 URI Too Long (no server crash)

steps.name: POST with invalid JSON
steps.action: POST /api/v1/collections with body '{"name: broken}' and auth token
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request with JSON parse error

steps.name: POST with XML content type
steps.action: POST /api/v1/collections with Content-Type: application/xml and JSON body
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: Request to non-existent endpoint (404)

steps.name: Hit non-existent path
steps.expected: 404 Not Found with generic error message (no stack trace)

test_cases.expected_result: Non-existent endpoint returns 404 without leaking internals

test_cases.name: Concurrent requests (5 simultaneous)

steps.name: Send 5 simultaneous requests
steps.action: Send 5 parallel GET /api/v1/entities requests with auth token
steps.expected: All 5 return 200 OK within reasonable time

test_cases.expected_result: All concurrent requests succeed without conflict

steps.name: Negative page
steps.expected: 400 Bad Request or 200 OK with first page

test_cases.name: Request with non-numeric ID
test_cases.expected_result: Non-numeric IDs rejected with appropriate error

steps.name: Update entity with empty body
steps.action: PUT /api/v1/entities/1/user-metadata with empty body and auth token

steps.name: Send 50MB JSON body
steps.action: POST /api/v1/collections with 50MB JSON body and auth token
steps.expected: 413 Request Entity Too Large or connection reset

steps.name: PATCH on entities endpoint
steps.expected: 405 Method Not Allowed or 404 Not Found

steps.name: List error reports
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of error reports

steps.name: Get formats
steps.expected: 200 OK with list of supported conversion formats

test_cases.name: Request timeout enforcement (60s limit)

steps.name: Verify normal requests complete well within timeout

test_cases.expected_result: Request timeout configured and normal requests complete quickly
